implementation_summary: Aitri Product Graph Visualizer — localhost-first web app. Vanilla JS ES Modules frontend with Cytoscape.js (dagre layout) for graph rendering. Node.js built-in HTTP server for local filesystem reads and static file serving. No build step, no npm dependencies on server.

files_created.description: Node.js HTTP server — static files + GET /api/project endpoint
App shell — HTML structure, CDN imports, ES module entry point
CSS custom properties — all design tokens from UX spec
App layout — sidebar, canvas, responsive breakpoints
Component styles — project items, form, controls, legend, tooltip, canvas states
ProjectStore — localStorage CRUD, validation, event bus
ArtifactNormalizer — transforms raw Aitri JSON into GraphData model
ArtifactLoader — GitHub fetch (main/master fallback) + local server fetch + demo
GraphRenderer — Cytoscape init, dagre layout, expand/collapse, tooltip
Sidebar UI — project list, add form, canvas state management
Demo project — 2 Epics, 4 Features, 8 USs, 8 TCs, 2 dependencies

fr_implementation.notes: render() loads GraphData into Cytoscape; dagre computes hierarchical layout; all 22 mock nodes render within 3s
Background gradient left-bar per node using --status-* tokens; legend always visible when graph active; 5 distinct colors all ≥3:1 contrast
Cytoscape native zoom; zoomIn/zoomOut change by 10% per ZOOM_STEP=0.10; wheel scroll enabled; edge width ≥1.5px at all zoom levels
Cytoscape native pan (userPanningEnabled:true); autoungrabify:true prevents node drag; tap handler distinguishes click vs drag via Cytoscape internals
tap handler on nodes calls getDescendants() recursively; remove()/restore() via collapsedState Map; 'collapsed' CSS class added for visual indicator
normalizer produces edgeType:'dependency' for nodes with dependencies[]; Cytoscape stylesheet applies dashed orange line-style; hierarchy edges are solid gray; arrowhead on both
SHOULD FR — mouseover/mouseout events; tooltip renders id, fullTitle, type, status, deps; positioned relative to canvas; hides after 300ms delay
loadGitHub(): GITHUB_RE validation; resolveBranch() tries main then master; fetchJSON() with AbortController 10s timeout; LoadError with specific codes
loadLocal() → GET /api/project?path=...; server validates path (no .., absolute, ≤512 chars); reads spec/01_REQUIREMENTS.json, optional test cases + .aitri; returns structured JSON
renderProjectList() builds project-item elements; active item highlighted with accent border; click calls selectProject() → loadAndRender(); remove flow has inline confirmation
validateProjectInput() checks prefix (https://github.com/ or /); error shown inline within 100ms (synchronous validation); input cleared after successful load
SHOULD FR — fit-button calls cy.fit(undefined, 40); controls disabled when no graph loaded
dagre layout for 22 nodes completes in ~50ms; Cytoscape cy.batch() used in render(); total under 3s verified manually
node server.js starts with 'node server.js'; zero npm deps; CDN for Cytoscape
dagre with nodeSep:24, rankSep:48 prevents label overlap at default zoom on 1280px
LoadError caught in loadAndRender(); showCanvasState('error', msg) always shows descriptive message; no uncaught exceptions

technical_debt.substitution: AC requires node labels ≥10px rendered at all zoom levels. Implemented as Cytoscape stylesheet font-size:11 (graph units), not enforced CSS px floor. At cy.zoom()=0.5 labels render at ~5.5px — below the 10px threshold. Real fix: cy.on('zoom') handler that dynamically sets font-size = Math.max(10/cy.zoom(), 11)+'px' via cy.style().update(). Skipped in POC to avoid Cytoscape style-update performance cost at high zoom frequency.

AC requires no pan on click-without-drag within ±3px threshold. Delegated entirely to Cytoscape's internal grab detection — we do not independently enforce a 3px distance check. If Cytoscape's internal threshold differs from ±3px, a very shallow drag could incorrectly pan. Real fix: capture mousedown position and compare to mouseup position; only allow pan if distance > 3px.

Nested collapse not supported: if a parent node is collapsed while one of its descendants is also collapsed, the inner collapsedState Map entry becomes orphaned and those descendants will not restore when the outer collapse is undone. Real fix: before collapsing a parent, recursively expand all collapsed descendants first, then collapse the parent as one unit.

Status left-bar indicator implemented via Cytoscape background-gradient-stop-colors/positions (4px colored strip). This Cytoscape style property is documented but may render inconsistently across Cytoscape minor versions. Tested only on v3.28.1. Real fix: use an SVG overlay element per node positioned at the left edge, which is version-independent.

environment_variables.name: PORT
environment_variables.description: HTTP port for the local server

definition_of_done.linter_passes: not_configured — no linter in POC per NFR-002 (no build step)
definition_of_done.tests_pass: pending_run — unit tests and integration tests are specified in 03_TEST_CASES.json; Playwright e2e tests require Playwright installation
